## Purpose 
See failure here due to ClimaParams not present in `experiments/calibration/Project.toml`
https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/841#019579ec-1902-427c-bb13-edd6e533177a

Run triggered on this branch (fails for a different reason related to calibration results): https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/849#0195fd9f-52a0-496f-8158-09ad1e59cf24

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Chores**
  - Streamlined internal automation processes, reducing many non-essential testing and environment initialization steps for improved maintenance.
- **New Features**
  - Enhanced calibration support by adding new climate parameter dependency, further strengthening backend data handling.

title: fix calibration test failing in longrun
